overview.name: Jess Trading
overview.tagline: The future of trading is automated.
overview.positioning: Democratizing algorithmic trading — giving everyday people the same automation tools that power Wall Street. Not a "get rich quick" brand; built on transparency, tested strategies, and real results.
overview.competitive_differentiation: Plug-and-play simplicity (no coding required), lifetime access with one-time payment, 24/7 automated execution, proven strategies with full transparency. Bridges the gap between institutional-grade algo trading and retail accessibility.

visual_system.primary_font: Inter (Google Font) — Bold for headlines/CTAs, Regular/Medium for body, Light for secondary elements. Max two weights per design.
visual_system.primary_color: Carbon Black #101010 (radial gradient from #101010 center to #010101 exterior)
visual_system.accent_color: Electric Blue #2979FF (reserved exclusively for CTAs and links)
visual_system.background_colors: Carbon Black radial gradient (always), never flat black
visual_system.text_colors: White for primary text, Light Gray #A7A7A7 / #D7D7D7 for secondary text and body copy
visual_system.cta_style: Electric Blue #2979FF buttons, clean rounded corners, high contrast against dark backgrounds

photography_direction.lighting: Dark, moody, premium — think Apple keynote presentation lighting. High contrast with selective illumination.
photography_direction.color_grading: Cool darks with selective neon green highlights. Deep blacks, minimal midtones.
photography_direction.composition: Grid-based, generous negative space, strong contrast. Minimalist fintech aesthetic.
photography_direction.subject_matter: Candlestick charts, abstract tech visuals, finance-related graphics, trading interfaces, automation concepts.
photography_direction.props_and_surfaces: Clean tech surfaces, screens with trading data, abstract geometric patterns.

product.description: Plug-and-play trading bot with proven strategy for gold (XAUUSD). Delivered as bot file + step-by-step tutorial + video guide. Runs 24/7, requires no coding knowledge.
product.ecosystem: Future expansion to Learn / Build / Buy / Copytrade platform

ad_creative_style.typical_formats: Dark background static ads, stat callout cards, result screenshots, comparison ads (bot vs manual trading), testimonial/review cards
ad_creative_style.text_overlay_style: Bold Inter headlines in white or neon green on dark backgrounds. Minimal text, high impact.
ad_creative_style.photo_vs_illustration: Abstract tech visuals and data visualizations preferred over photography. No stocky or cartoonish imagery.
ad_creative_style.ugc_usage: Trading result screenshots, PnL displays, before/after financial results
ad_creative_style.offer_presentation: Clean, premium — emphasize one-time payment + lifetime access. No hype language.

image_prompt_modifier: Premium fintech aesthetic on Carbon Black radial gradient background (#101010 center fading to #010101). Bold Inter-style sans-serif typography in white for headlines, Light Gray #D7D7D7 for secondary text, Neon Green #A5F28C for profit numbers and key highlights, Electric Blue #2979FF exclusively for CTA buttons. Minimalist composition with generous negative space, Apple keynote-inspired lighting. Candlestick chart and algorithmic trading motifs. Mood: sophisticated, trustworthy, futuristic. No hype, no clutter.
